options.text: I want to change my flight because I’m bored.
My mother was rushed to the hospital — I really need to get there ASAP.
I’m late for work, so I need a new ticket.
The weather is bad, so I’d prefer another flight.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体事件（被紧急送医）和强烈语气（ASAP），增强了说服力，符合场景要求。其他选项要么理由不紧急（无聊、迟到），要么与家庭紧急情况无关（天气），不符合‘说明紧急原因’的核心目标。
content.speakerText: I need to change my flight because my mom had a sudden accident.
content.speakerTextCn: 我得改签，我妈妈突然出事故了。

options.text: I need to change my plans because my dog ran away.
My father had a stroke and I need to fly home immediately.
I just changed my mind — I don’t want to go anymore.
The hotel canceled my reservation, so I need to adjust my flight.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体、严重的医疗紧急事件（中风），符合‘说明紧急原因’的高说服力要求。其他选项中，狗走丢和‘改变主意’不够紧急，酒店取消属于服务问题，非家庭紧急事件，不符合场景核心。
content.speakerText: I have to reschedule my trip — something urgent came up at home.
content.speakerTextCn: 我必须改期我的行程——家里出了点紧急情况。

options.text: I’m sorry, but I need to reschedule because my meeting was moved.
My sister just gave birth — I need to be there for the first time.
I forgot my passport at home.
I think the flight is too expensive — can I get a discount?

content.explanation: 正确答案用具体事件（妹妹刚生孩子，首次见证）增强了紧急性和情感说服力。其他选项要么是工作安排（非紧急）、要么是��人疏忽（非突发紧急），或与费用相关，均不符合‘家庭突发紧急事件’的场景核心。
content.speakerText: Can you help me change my flight? I have an emergency.
content.speakerTextCn: 你能帮我改签吗？我有急事。
